publishedAbstract: - Complete multipart upload operation fails with error ' Cannot read property 'sort' of undefined' ~~~ aws s3api--endpoint https://s3-openshift-storage.apps.sdstest.ceeindia.support--no-verify-ssl complete-multipart-upload--multipart-upload file://fileparts.json--bucket test-3450ce36-6f44-40af-b6b8-6340c9813b12--key test-multipart--upload-id 61e00b0bc7e4a1000d79403e An error occurred (InternalError) when calling the CompleteMultipartUpload operation (reached max retries: 2): We encountered an internal error. Please try again. ~~~
publishedTitle: Complete multipart upload operation fails with error ' Cannot read property 'sort' of undefined'
